cycle_title: Restructure theorem and simulation framing for Bayes factors and LOOIC
completed: Reprioritized the theorem backlog so LOOIC and Bayes-factor consequences follow the mixture and KL route before secondary AIC/BIC thresholds.
Restructured the manuscript simulation sections around Bayesian candidate models, leave-out targets, LOOIC, Bayes factors, diagnostics, and secondary bridge metrics.
Added a comparison plan that keeps predictive LOOIC and prior-sensitive Bayes-factor evidence conceptually distinct.
Updated C-004 wording without promoting its planned evidence status.
why_it_matters: The project now asks criterion-appropriate questions about whether omitted context makes false complexity predict better and whether it receives greater declared-prior model evidence.
The plan prevents invalid use of the current GLM proxy as if it had produced Bayesian criteria.

checks_run.name: Remote content consistency review
checks_run.notes: Verified that the theorem backlog, project context, manuscript scaffold, milestones, loop protocol, claim register, and Lean status metadata use the same LOOIC/Bayes-factor ordering.

checks_run.name: make smoke

checks_run.notes: The active writable workspace path was unavailable; this update does not change R code.

checks_run.notes: The active writable workspace path was unavailable; the update changes comments and theorem-card metadata only.

decision_needed.question: Which leave-out target should be primary for the first Bayesian comparison: participant-level LOOIC or trial-level LOOIC?
options: Participant-level LOOIC, with trial-level LOOIC as a secondary diagnostic (recommended).
Trial-level LOOIC as the primary target.
decision_needed.default_if_no_response: Do not run Bayesian comparison cells until the primary leave-out target is selected.

procedure_compliance.notes: No new theorem assumption, false-complex model choice, causal claim, restricted data, expensive compute, or claim-status promotion was added. The change restructures the planned criterion targets and records a leave-out-unit decision gate.

risks_or_uncertainties: Bayes factors require a separate proper-prior and marginal-likelihood specification before implementation or theorem statement.
LOOIC results depend on the selected leave-out unit and on reliable PSIS diagnostics.
The current GLM proxy remains unable to calculate valid Bayesian criteria.
next_bounded_task: Implement a posterior-draw comparison interface after PI selection of the primary leave-out target and a documented Bayes-factor prior specification.
